lines.en_lit: halakha is in accordance with Rabbi Yosei And Rabbi Yosei concedes that if violated and served his service is valid. Rav Yehuda said Rav said: halakha is in accordance with Rabbi Yosei, and Rabbi Yosei conceded that if original dies, returns to his service
obvious. Lest you say would be for him rival wife in lifetime; teaches us
Rabbi Yehuda says: even designate another wife for the Rabbis: Aren’t they concerned lest the Rabbis said to you: Impurity is common, Death is not common,

the Rabbis said to If so, there is no end to the matter. spoke well to Rabbi Yehuda, Rabbi Yehuda said to you: For death of one we are concerned; for death of two we are not concerned, And the Rabbis If there is to be concerned even for death of two we are concerned.
the Rabbis let them say to their own the Rabbis said to you: The High Priest is vigilant If he is vigilant why do designate another priest once we establish rival, all the more so be more vigilant

And is designation sufficient for him? The Merciful One stated his house” and this is not his wife He betroths her But As long as he has not married her, she is not his house, that he marries her. If so, has two houses, and the Merciful One said: “And he shall make atonement for himself and for his house” and not for two houses.

that he then divorces her. If he divorces her, our difficulty is restored to its place. No, necessary where divorces her provisionally, as he says to her: This is your bill of divorce on condition that you die And perhaps neither will die, and has two houses

Rather, where said to her, This is your bill of divorce on condition that you will not die If not die, she is divorced if she dies, isn’t that alive And perhaps the not die and her bill of divorce will be bill of divorce, her counterpart leaving without a wife

Rather, where said to her: This is your bill of divorce on condition that one of you dies. this dies, that is alive, that dies, isn’t this alive? And perhaps neither one of them die, and he will have two houses.

And furthermore, Is of that sort bill of divorce? But didn’t Rava say: This is your bill of divorce on condition that you will not drink wine all the days of my life and your life, that is not severance.
all the days of the life of so-and-so; that is severance.

Rather, where said to This is your bill of divorce on condition that your counterpart, will not die. If her counterpart, does not die, is divorced; and if dies, isn’t alive And perhaps her counterpart will die in the middle of the service, and it will become clear
